name: copilot-mission-control
description: Copilot Mission Control — a live dashboard for the GitHub Copilot CLI

scripts.build:frontend: rm -rf dist/game dist/assets dist/docs && tsc -p tsconfig.renderer.json && cp src/game/index.html dist/game/ && cp src/game/hud.js dist/game/ && cp node_modules/phaser/dist/phaser.min.js dist/game/ && cp -R assets dist/assets && mkdir -p dist/docs/img && cp docs/img/copilot-mission-control.webp dist/docs/img/
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && cd src-tauri && cargo build
scripts.start: npm run build:frontend && cd src-tauri && cargo tauri dev
scripts.test: npm run build:frontend && npx playwright test
scripts.test:headed: npm run build:frontend && npx playwright test --headed

author: Dan Wahlin
